Name: Aldvi
Description: Aldvi is one of the ancient and mythical Doom Maidens, specifically the Doom Maiden of Deceit. The Doom Maidens were savage berserk Valkyries who terrorized many ancient lands before being neutralized by the Asgardian All Father Odin. Aldvi is a Marvel character created by Cullen Bunn, Will Sliney and Veronica Gandini, first appearing in Fearless Defenders #3 released in 2013.
